content:
is there a place where i can read all the story out of the game?
i want to read it but i dont want to go through playing the chapters again
atm not yet, closest is Story Mode since that skips all battles and exploration segments
her body is mostly made of ink and paper, so theres literally nothing there
it helps to remember awakener bodies can be nonorganic since they can choose what they're made of during the awakening procedure
LOL r u forwarding me to this channel???
I didn't know!
hello everyone I'm home
welcome hone
i hope you become a regular
so that you can join our shenanigans
the fanfic potential for this *ridiculous*
such as yesterday's topic: if Doresain was a woman would he have big tits or still be flat chested on account of him eating his own tits?
is he prone to doing that
a common running gag/headcanon here is that he already ate his dick off
hungry guy! someone get him a subway
thank you for point-blank looping me into the joke
mm... I need to look at him again to give u an answer
i've been staring at his boob window shirt for a while now.. ig i'll just draw two versions, one flat and one with d(ore) cups
also i did have to draw naked doresain as a base for my dore standee, can confirm that he does not have a dihresain
does it have a bite mark?
i am a little more inclined to draw d cup dore because.... well........ if biav wont give dore more buffs then i'll do it myself <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
guys
kath, horla, hameln, castor is this team good
ask <#1170692781216378960>  this is lorechat
that’s not Arisu
<:Winkle_frustrated:1468257899330539774>
i know
if it was the usual arisu i would be rougher

How am I meant to interpret this...? Is Kath's deepdive set in kadath, but she ran into a miskatonic investigator ~~or N pretending to be one~~ in this world? She cant vaguely recall the name mythag or take a note to them if she isnt in kadath, but its not exactly likely a miskatonic student found their way to this world, even if it is just N fucking with her
what in the goddamn...
all this time ive been working on the assumption that kath is kadath exclusive
i might have to check the cn text for that

My interpretation is Kath is kadath exclusive and this is either a miskatonic member who somehow crossed the gate, or more than likely just N messing with her again, i dont know *why* he chose a miskatonic guise though...
The paper he gives to Kath is signed from dexter
But i believe its in kadath at least
its just so weird for them to namedrop miskatonic and mythag in the same few sentences like that
Every time miskatonic comes up I have to wonder why they even made that decision with how often they seem to forget they wrote it in <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
it definitely takes place in kadath because her affinity story follows it up with her arriving in mythag with the letter
Yeah alright that makes sense, just N bullshit as always I guess, either that or it could be a mistranslation. Just a really weird thing to add for no reason
omg alva frenzy is so adorable
The stalker in your walls:
me in your walls
ok i just checked the cn text. both lines use 弥萨格 which is mythag, so it is a mistranslation
Ahhh gotcha, thanks for the clarification <:Erica_OK:1468259134318317774>
no worries! it got me worrird for a moment too
Is her deepdive translated?
bc they used both Miskatonic and Mythag here
ah yeah
It is labeled as localized yes
Can we date ramona
is having dinner at her house not enough?
also whats this 520 deal and why is pandia suddenly so nice?
what happens in any of the reproduction frenzy stages
Keeper experience being a bottom
seggs! (unless its a kid)
or faros
faros is just wholesome
or any of the ramonas i guess
Where?
mail
Oop lemme see, was in fight when update dropped
Leigh is also wholesome
she just wants a hug
Uvhas just wants to give you gift because you’re his best pal <:please:1356053110375714817>
catfight got nerfed lmao
I guess Light just want people to fight him more
This seems pretty in character for her actually
light wants people to beat him up
Fair, many new folk completely bombed by light. While veterans torture him.
ah today is 520
whats 520?
chinese holiday about love iirc
basically a slang for love
so they chose Pandia
the fraudest of the fraud
Quite funny they did it so late though
the fake top!
5/20 is almost over in most eastern countries
Let the poor girl be a switch!
Light just remembered
she was saving the hot stuff for after sunset
True..
clearly she was busy polising as she said
with 520 letters veterans will love him and no longer want to whip his ass anymore!
I think pandia letters would make them want to whip him more
Sorry light I am doing a 50 turn standard banner counter clear. And you can't tell me otherwise.
520 sediment
Any chance they mistaked sediment for silver lol
Theyve mailed out sediment before
<:blowkiss:1356053035780014150> they can’t take it back now. Anyway. Thank you pandia
Besides, I'd rather 520 sediment than silver!
Pandia somehow gets a lot of hate
Or I’ve seen a lot of hate. For some reason
Letter fits her though, shes always been more about making people love it compared to wanda just dominating, so it makes sense she'd send a letter about love with how much she talks about it
The sessions are her love language, how else could she express herself
people doesn’t love it tho
N ghosted her after half session
the real sadists look down on her
N gets bored of everyone to be fair
except us
nah Pandia is just that boring
and kath apparently
he went out of his way to fck Erica Sorel Ryker Xu Kath
Granted Kath is actively trying to obliterate him Exodia style
but ghosted poor Pandia
To be fair not many people can just come back to life and shoot him in the face and do actual damage to him, that was probably exhilarating after eons of nothing
imagine being so boring the aeon of entertainment ignores you

can you blame him
he already saw Thais at her freakiest
he looks kinda funny
seeing thais at her freakiest to him is like seeing your sibling eat sand. she does it all the time that youre used to it
the face of a dog that got locked out of his own acc
Were you raised peakly
idk, i was let down quite a lot growing up
My bad, I'll try to mention next Time
Crasy wordplay
I cope
is there a way to hide the enemies that appear on the stage, they kinda spoil stuff sometimes.
sry nope
You could close your eyes when starting the stage <:AuritaPlease:1441865338537902292>
Instructions unclear, accidentally missed the start investigation button and pulled on arc 1 kaleido <:wish:1356084702468899117>
Nope
Unless bugs
aint no way
Wont you applaud? A plot twist always calls for the audience’s participation.
Guys why did the keeper try to find the primavara in chap 2

tf is a primavara
Some sculptur made by rogers
Like what was the point of finding it
oh that one
They were after roger and jenkins sis right
yeah they figured out that mason was taken by the sculptors so they were chasing a lead of an oddly specific wax museum
also there was a nonzero chance that mason was turned into a statue
Oh i see they tried to find it to check if it was made from humans?
specifically if mason was one of them
they already had no doubt that it was made from humans

we need old arc 1 plan back<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

he : ⬛
cliffhanger ass finale bro 😭
he's built like a hsr story chapter 😍
Doresain would eat his tits if he had them, but he would replace them with the same filigree his legs are made of so they'd still look good under (and outside of?) a shirt
wireframe boobs

we already have fire boobs and lightning boobs, I feel like filigree is just the natural next step
When the keeper fights in arc 2 do they summon awakeners or fire energy blast with their key

Summon from memory
With SF level, keeper can misremember them as 30% stronger

by process of elimination if we got the filigree boobs we would need wood boobs, water boobs, and rock boobs to achieve Wuxing
In order: knockers, water balloons, boulders
the world is beautiful if u have eyes to behold it

I wasn't looking do it again
hey
pst
hi
